arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle and Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates on a pivotal night in the title race
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of a critical night in the title race as Liverpool host Newcastle while Arsenal travel to the City Ground to take on Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Romano reveals FINAL Arsenal decision on signing Sterling permanently
arts.sum: Arsenal will not sign Raheem Sterling permanently in the summer, according to Fabrizio Romano. The former England international moved from West to North London last year, joining the Gunners on a season-long loan from Chelsea on Deadline Day.

arts.ttl: ‘He was amazing’: Gabriel Martinelli says he absolutely loves player Arsenal sold for £20m
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli has been at Arsenal so long that he almost feels like an academy product. Indeed, when Martinelli broke into the Arsenal team alongside...

arts.ttl: 'He's so good': Chris Wood names the Nottingham Forest player who he likes playing alongside the most
Arsenal Invincibles: Where are they now? Including England staff member and padel coach
Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Gunners look to close gap
arts.sum: The Gunners need to win to keep any hope of eventually winning the title, with Liverpool 11 points ahead before kick-off

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand disagrees with Mikel Arteta's Premier League title race view as Arsenal told reality
arts.sum: I think there are games in the season where you look back and go 'that was the one, that set the tone and put a nail in the coffin of all the opponents and took the confidence and life out of all the people chasing'. Rio Ferdinand has weighed in on the Premier League title chase, suggesting Liverpool have effectively clinched the title, with Arne Slot's side becoming overwhelming favourites after a crucial week.

arts.ttl: He only managed 16 appearances for Nottingham Forest but he still managed to silence Derby County
Arsenal in pole position to sign £50m star after Real Madrid and Liverpool update
arts.sum: Although the club are said to have wanted to bring Zubimendi to London in the January transfer window, Sociedad agreed with the midfielder to postpone his sale until after this season. Arsenal still remain in the race to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey drops early Arsenal team news hint as Mikel Arteta makes Mikel Merino decision
arts.sum: Arsenal head into the tie off the back of a disappointing defeat to West Ham. Jarrod Bowen fired the Hammers to a 1-0 victory at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday, ending the North Londoners' 15-game unbeaten streak . Thomas Partey has dropped a team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Nottingham Forest .
